4430.one_line_summary: Virtual functions and human-readable descriptions for Ethereum transactions.
4430.notes: Solves the UX problem of opaque transaction signing by allowing contracts to generate paired descriptions and bytecode.

4494.one_line_summary: ERC-712-signed approvals for ERC-721 NFTs enabling gasless permit flows.
4494.notes: Extends ERC-2612 permit pattern to NFTs; nonce increments per NFT transfer.

4519.one_line_summary: NFTs representing physical assets with mutual authentication and secure communication.
4519.notes: Extends ERC-721 with asset address, user assignment, and cryptographic key agreement protocols.

4521.one_line_summary: Adds ERC-20 compatible transfer() function to ERC-721 NFTs.
4521.notes: Simple compatibility bridge; allows NFTs to work with ERC-20-aware contracts and wallets.

4524.one_line_summary: Extends ERC-20 with ERC-165 interface detection and safeTransfer callbacks.
4524.notes: Brings NFT safety patterns (safeTransfer/safeTransferFrom) and EIP-165 to ERC-20 tokens.

4527.one_line_summary: QR code data transmission protocol between offline signers and watch-only wallets.
4527.notes: Uses UR encoding and animated QR codes; supports key distribution, transactions, and EIP-712 typed data.

4546.one_line_summary: Singleton contract for unified asset deposits across ERC-20, ERC-721, ERC-1155, and Ether.
4546.notes: Primary purpose is token management/deposit UX; uses ERC-20/721/1155 as infrastructure.

4626.one_line_summary: Standard API for tokenized vaults representing shares of underlying ERC-20 tokens.
4626.notes: Core DeFi primitive; defines deposit/withdraw/redeem semantics for yield-bearing tokens.

4671.one_line_summary: Non-tradable tokens (soulbound badges) for diplomas, credentials, and personal achievements.
4671.notes: Explicitly non-transferable; represents inherently personal possessions; includes enumerable, delegate, and consensus extensions.

4675.one_line_summary: Fractionalize multiple NFTs into fungible shares within a single contract.
4675.notes: Each token ID represents a distinct fractionalized NFT; improves on separate ERC-20 deployment pattern.

4799.one_line_summary: Designate ownership of NFTs held in escrow while preserving original authenticity.
4799.notes: Enables rental, collateral, fractional ownership without losing authenticity; creates directed acyclic graph of NFTs.

4804.one_line_summary: Translate HTTP-style Web3 URLs to EVM call messages for read-only contract execution.
4804.notes: Enables direct Web3 access and on-chain web content rendering; supports ENS resolution and method auto-detection.

4824.one_line_summary: API standard for DAOs relating on-chain and off-chain membership and proposals.
4824.notes: Defines daoURI and JSON-LD schemas for members, proposals, activity log, and governance; enables DAO discoverability.

4834.one_line_summary: Generic hierarchical name resolution with arbitrary access control, similar to ENS.
4834.notes: All domains (including TLDs and root) are contracts; simpler than ENS with standardized access control.

4883.one_line_summary: Compose SVG NFTs by concatenating rendered SVG strings from other NFTs.
4883.notes: Enables on-chain SVG composability; used by Loogies; concatenation order determines rendering (painters model).
